SNECKO-MUDDLE.title: Muddle
SNECKO-MUDDLE.description:
Muddling a card changes its cost this turn to between [blue]0[/blue] and [blue]3[/blue] at random.
The cost after Muddling always differs from the original cost.
SNECKO-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
SNECKO-OVERFLOW.description: Overflow effects activate if you have more than [blue]5[/blue] cards in [gold]Hand[/gold].
